name: Geometric Area Rug Cream - Threshold™
description:
Liven up your indoor space with the global-inspired design of this Cream geometric Area Rug from Threshold™. Showcasing intricate geometric motifs in a vibrant color palette against a solid cream base for an eye-catching flair, and a woven design for soft comfort underfoot, this cream geo area rug will add delightful flair and comfort to your room. With a no-backing design for fuss-free maintenance and a medium-pile height that adds an additional layer of comfort underfoot, this rectangular area rug makes a wonderful addition to any space.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
